---
name: Schema Change
about: Propose adding, modifying, or removing a field in a JSON Schema
labels: schema-change
---

## Entity / Schema File

> e.g., `schemas/trust-profile.json`, field `allowed_issuers`

## Change Description

<!-- What field is being added, modified, or removed? -->

## Motivation

<!-- Why is this change needed? What problem does it solve? -->

## Breaking Change?

- [ ] Yes — removes or renames an existing field (MAJOR)
- [ ] Yes — adds a new required field (MAJOR)
- [ ] No — adds a new optional field (MINOR)

## Conformance Fixtures

- [ ] I will include updated/new conformance fixtures with this change
